context.usage: Used as the 64x64 portrait for the Jarl (player) shown in the winter-round HUD.
adjacent_elements: Resource bars and resource queue panel

art_style.constraint: 1-bit monochrome look (black/white with optional single mid-gray for anti-aliasing)

shape.silhouette: Viking chieftain head-and-shoulders icon; readable hornless helmet or fur hood; stern expression

description: Create a 64x64 monochrome (black/white) pixel-art portrait icon for the Jarl (player). The game is strictly grayscale: avoid any hue. Use strong silhouette and high contrast, inspired by Papers Please UI readability. Keep at least a 1px outline for clarity on both light and dark HUD panels.
acceptance_criteria: Only grayscale colors are used (#000000, #FFFFFF, optionally #7F7F7F)
Silhouette remains readable at 1x scale against both black and white backgrounds
